title: Namor
content:
{{CharHub|Namor|Namor}} {{Character |image = Namor Profile.png |real name = Ch'ah Toh Almehen[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Hoe6eD2lTGNCxMbGc6BvEh_VhhJW5RN8/view ''Black Panther: Wakanda Forever'' script] |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Namor{{Ref|BPWF}}
K'uk'ulkan{{Ref|BPWF}} |nicknames = El Niño sin Amor{{Ref|BPWF}}Translates from Spanish to: "''The Boy without Love''"
Fish Man{{Ref|BPWF}}}} |species = [[Talokanil]] [[Mutant]] |citizenship = [[Talokan|Talokanil]] |gender = Male |DOB = [[Before 20th Century#1571|1571]]{{Ref|BPWF}} |title = King of [[Talokan]] |movie = ''[[Black Panther: Wakanda Forever]]''
''[[Avengers: Doomsday]]'' (unreleased) |actor = [[Tenoch Huerta]]
[[Manuel Chavez]] (young) |status = Alive}} {{Quote|A [[Spain|Spanish]] man of faith cursed me as he died by my hand. He called me, 'El Niño sin Amor', 'the child without love'. And I took my name from there. Namor. Because I have no love for the [[Humans|surface world]].|Namor to [[Shuri]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} King '''Ch'ah Toh Almehen''' is a [[Talokanil]] [[mutant]] who rules the underwater kingdom of [[Talokan]]. As he aged slowly and gained the respect of the Talokanil, they started to worship him as '''K'uk'ulkan'''.Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''Feathered Serpent God''" Following his mother's death, he visited the surface world and witnessed the atrocities of {{WPS|Spanish colonization of the Americas|Spanish colonization}}, causing him to take violent action, earning him the name '''Namor''' from his enemies. Determined to protect his people from the surface world, Namor felt threatened when the [[United States]] came close to discovering his country while searching for [[vibranium]]. Namor came into contact with [[Wakanda]] and proposed a military alliance, but the [[Golden Tribe]] resisted waging war against the world. In response, Namor led his people against Wakanda, claiming the life of [[Ramonda]]. He was ultimately defeated by [[Shuri]], now the new [[:Category:Black Panthers|Black Panther]], and was forced to yield, still expecting that eventually Wakanda would ask for his help. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Born a Mutant==== [[File:Birth of Namor.png|{{AltFloat}}|Ch'ah Toh Almehen is born underwater]] {{Quote|My mother gave birth to me there, and I became the firstborn son of [[Talokan]].|Namor|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Ch'ah Toh Almehen was born in [[Before 20th Century#1571|1571]] as the son of [[Fen]] and an Aztec Purépecha pochteca mercenary spy[https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/chapter-5-letitia-wright-tenoch-huerta-dr-gerardo-aldana/id1651004191?i=1000598609094 ''Wakanda Forever: The Official Black Panther Podcast: Chapter 5: Letitia Wright, Tenoch Huerta, Dr. Gerardo Aldana''] in the [[Yucatán]]. Prior to his birth, Fen, pregnant at the time, and her fellow tribesman of Mesoamericans became inflicted with smallpox brought by [[Spain|Spanish]] [[Conquistadores]]. To survive, the tribe consumed a [[Talokanil Herb|blue plant]] found underwater in an attempt to alleviate their sickness. However, the plant was laced with traces of [[Vibranium]], altering the tribe's anatomy and biology in the process. [[File:FenGrowsOld.png|{{AltFloat}}|Ch'ah Toh Almehen watches [[Fen]] grow old]] The tribe became the first [[Talokanil]], retreating to the ocean to start their new lives there, away from the threats of the surface world. Shortly afterward, Almehen was born, with the effects of the plant Fen consumed causing him to undergo abnormal mutations such as winged feet, pointed ears and a human-like skin color.{{Ref|BPWF}} He never knew his father. Almehen would be recognized as the firstborn son of [[Talokan]], as well as a [[mutant]], and worshipped as their feathered Serpent God, K'uk'ulkan. As Almehen grew up, Fen told him stories about a [[Wakanda|place]] with clean air and water which was protected so that people would never have to leave.{{Ref|BPWF}} She also told him the Aztec stories his father had once told her, including of the Aztec underworld paradise Tlālōcān, which inspired him in the naming of their underwater paradise, with the translation into their tongue of Yucatec Maya, "Talokan." ====Mother's Burial==== [[File:YoungNamorFlies.png|{{AltFloat}}|Almehen intimidates the settlers]] {{Quote|As [[Fen|she]] grew older, my mother mourned the life on land that she once knew, and died with a broken heart. She made me promise to bury her in the soil of her homeland. Nothing could prepare me for what I found there.|Namor|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Per his [[Fen|mother]]'s wishes, Almehen came to the surface with other [[Talokanil]] to bury her. They saw many Mayan people being abused as slaves for a plantation. Distraught, Almehen flew up into the air, scaring the settlers, who shot at him. Almehen did not care as he still flew, ordering the Talokanil to [[Attack on the Yucatán Spanish Settlement|burn]] the village. [[File:Black Panther II Trailer (29).png|{{AltFloat}}|Almehen has the [[Talokanil]] attack the Spanish colonizers]] The young Talokanil coldly watched as many settlers died and the village was burned. He then helped dig a hole in the ground, burying Fen, sticking an object in her mouth. A dying priest derisively called Almehen, ''"El Niño sin Amor"'', meaning "the child without love." Ch'ah Toh Almehen proceeded to take that as his name, Namor, as a warning to his enemies. This experience showed him how bad the surface world was and that he needed to protect his kind from it.{{Ref|BPWF}} ===Ruler of Talokan=== ====[[Attack on the Harvey Sub-Sea|Protecting His Kingdom]]==== [[File:NamorInTheSky.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor takes down the helicopter]] {{Quote|The [[United States Navy SEALs|American military]] detected [[vibranium]] under my [[Talokan|nation]]'s domain. I was able to [[Attack on the Harvey Sub-Sea|stop]] them from minin' it... but [[Talokanil|we]] need [[Wakanda]]'s help to prevent it from happenin' again. They use a [[Vibranium Detector|machine]] designed by an [[Riri Williams|American scientist]].|Namor to [[Ramonda]] and [[Shuri]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Nearly [[2025|half a millennium]] later, Namor located a [[Vibranium Detector]] under the ocean placed there by the [[United States of America]]. Angry, he sent his army after the people, killing [[Rita Salazar]] and [[Jackson (Navy SEAL)|Jackson]] in the process. Namor then let [[Attuma]] and [[Namora]] attack the ship while he stayed in the distance. When Dr. [[Graham (Doctor)|Graham]] and a pilot got away on a helicopter, Namor flew after them and grabbed the tail of the aircraft. He then spun it around in circles before slamming it into the water, killing the two passengers.{{Ref|BPWF}} {{Clear}} ====Visiting Wakanda==== [[File:NamorArrivesinWakanda.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor greets [[Ramonda]] and [[Shuri]]]] {{Quote|This [[Wakanda|place]] is amazing, the air is pristine, and the water...|Namor to [[Ramonda]] and [[Shuri]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Angry at [[Wakanda]], Namor quietly sneaked into Wakanda through the waters and met with Queen [[Ramonda]] and Princess [[Shuri]]. He complimented the place for its pristine air and natural waters before Ramonda asked who he was. He told them that he was known as the K'uk'ulkan, but his enemies called him Namor. [[File:NamorPutsDownShell.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor puts down the shell]] He revealed to the two how [[T'Challa]]'s choice of revealing [[Vibranium]] to the world compromised his [[Talokan|nation]] and how he wanted Wakanda to capture the [[Ironheart|scientist]] who created the [[Vibranium Detector]] so that he could kill her. Namor knelt down, placing a conk shell on the sand. He told the two Wakandans to blow into it and place it into the water once they would have acquired the scientist, and he said he would be there shortly after. Before he jumped into the water and left, Namor warned Ramonda and Shuri not to mention anything about him to anyone outside of Wakanda.{{Ref|BPWF}} ===[[Talokanil-Wakandan War]]=== ====Showcasing Talokan==== [[File:NamorTellsShuriHisBackground.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor tells [[Shuri]] his story]] {{Quote|I know you wished me to spare the life of the [[Riri Williams|scientist]]. But now you see [[Talokan|what]] I have to protect.|Namor to [[Shuri]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} [[Attuma]] and [[Namora]] successfully [[Chase of Riri Williams|captured]] both [[Shuri]] and [[Riri Williams]] in [[Cambridge]]. They then brought the hostages back. As Namor painted, Shuri approached him. He talked to her about his past and how he got his name as well as [[Fen]]. He then gave her a high-pressure suit and led Shuri to a rift in the water. She dropped in, causing her to go flying with the current. [[File:NamorGreetsShuriInTalokan.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor meets up with [[Shuri]]]] Namor swam around Shuri and met her on the other side where they found a whale swimming above them. He then showed her all of [[Talokan]]. Shuri believed it was beautiful and was astonished at the technology, pointing out the [[vibranium]] buildings. Back in [[Namor's Cenote]], Namor gave Shuri the bracelet of his mother as a gift for the first outsider in Talokan. Shuri took it as Namor talked about wanting to burn the world. Shuri refused, but Namor reminded her that he heard her say the same thing at the beach in [[Wakanda]].{{Ref|BPWF}} ====Meeting with Ramonda==== [[File:Namor and Ramonda.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor threatens [[Ramonda]]]] {{Quote|If you tell the [[United States of America|Americans]] about [[Talokanil|us]]... if you try to find us... or if I discover a single [[Wakanda]]n ship in the ocean... I will kill the [[Shuri|princess]]. I will come to [[Wakanda]]... and I will kill you.|Namor to [[Ramonda]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Namor was then contacted by Queen [[Ramonda]] and met her up at the beach. Ramonda wanted [[Shuri]] back, but Namor claimed that Shuri wanted to come to [[Talokan]]. Ramonda asked Namor what she could trade him for her. Namor politely told her there was nothing. Ramonda begged to differ and told him she would tell the [[United States of America]] of Talokan's presence. Namor got close to her, nearly in her face. He coldly told Ramonda that he would kill Shuri if it came to it.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====Meeting in Capital City==== [[File:BP Wakanda Forever Trailer (10).png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor announces a war]] {{Quote|Máansa'ab u nej miis tin wich i'pante muula i'cochi. Yaalah... aalabil o'tamah tu lakal ichilo'n. [[Talokan]] maatan u luumil hets'kuba. [[Namora]]. [[Attuma]]. Le kan tal-o'n yetelo'b, mixbik'in tuukul uuchul noh-och tin Talokan! Líik'ik Talokan!Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''I was blinded by hope of partnership. And... I have compromised all of us. Talokan will not move again. Namora. Attuma. When we are done with them, they will never think of approaching Talokan! Rise Talokan!''"|Namor to the [[Talokanil]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Namor returned to his [[Namor's Cenote|cenote]] and found a [[Talokanil]] on the ground, having been shot by [[Nakia]], who [[Escape from Namor's Cenote|rescued]] [[Shuri]] and [[Riri Williams]]. Realizing it was all a diversion, Namor grew angry. He called for a meeting in [[Talokan]]. Swimming down to his throne, he gave a speech, admitting to his fault of believing in an alliance, putting Talokan's safety in jeopardy. However, he promised to make it right, calling for [[Talokanil-Wakandan War|war]].{{Ref|BPWF}} ====[[Attack on Birnin Zana]]==== [[File:NamorEmergesFromWater.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor enters [[Wakanda]]]] {{Quote|[[Ramonda|She]] did [[Talokanil-Wakandan War|this]]! In one week's time, I will return with my entire [[Talokanil Armed Forces|army]], and you will join us against the surface world, or I will wash [[Wakanda]] from the face of the [[Earth]]! Bury your dead. Mourn your losses. You are queen now.|Namor to [[Nakia]], [[Okoye]], and [[Shuri]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Namor led his [[Talokanil Armed Forces|army]] into [[Wakanda]]. They flooded [[Birnin Zana]] as they invaded. Namor walked out of the water, witnessing the destruction. On the beach, [[Namora]] knelt to him, saying that the defenses had left, and it was his turn to strike. Suddenly, [[M'Baku]] leaped from behind. Namor noticed and put up his fist, blocking the attack and breaking M'Baku's club. He then swiftly turned around and punched M'Baku in the chest, sending him flying. [[File:NamorSeesShuri.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor sees [[Shuri]] in the ''[[Sunbird]]'']] Namor then raised his [[Talokanil Spear|spear]], calling for the [[Talokanil]] to go after civilians. He then flew up and attacked the aircrafts in the sky. Using his swiftness to maneuver in the air, he sliced many [[Royal Talon Fighter]]s and [[Dragon Flyer]]s before reaching [[Shuri]] and [[Aneka]]'s ''[[Sunbird]]''. He sliced the ''Sunbird'', sending them into the water. [[File:NamorThrowsWaterBombs.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor throws [[Hydrobomb]]s]] Approaching [[Ramonda]] in the [[Citadel]], Namor tried to pierce the glass with his spear, though his attack had little effect as Ramonda defiantly remained unfazed. Namor grew angry and flew away before returning with a hoard of [[Hydrobomb]]s. He threw the bombs at the window, shattering it and sending Ramonda and [[Riri Williams]] flying. The bombs Namor threw caused the room to rapidly fill with water, sweeping Williams beneath the waves and forcing Ramonda to go under to save her. While she saved Williams, Ramonda ultimately drowned in the water and was unable to be resuscitated, leaving Shuri to anguish over her demise. [[File:BPWF Namor from Talokan.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Namor tells [[Shuri]] to mourn her losses]] Namor proclaimed that Ramonda was responsible for the conflict between the Wakandans and the Talokanil, and in one week's time, he would return with his entire army. Namor then gave the Wakandans a choice: join him, or else he would wash Wakanda from the face of the [[Earth]]. Namor coldly pointed at Shuri, telling her to bury the dead and mourn her losses as he declared her Queen while flying down to the water.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====[[Ambush on the Talokanil|Battling Black Panther]]==== [[File:NamorFindsDetector.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor approaches the [[Vibranium Detector]]]] {{Quote|Princess."
"No. I am the Black Panther, and I'm here for retribution!|Namor and [[Black Panther]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Back in [[Talokan]], Namor was looking at the same conk shell in his hands while sitting in his throne. He was then approached and informed by [[Attuma]] and [[Namora]] that there was another [[Vibranium Detector]] that had been launched into the ocean. He and his [[Talokanil Armed Forces|forces]] approached the detector, only for it to emit a loud pulse. Namor plugged his ears, yelling for everyone to get to the surface. They quickly swam up to the top of the water, only to see the ''[[Sea Leopard]]'', where the [[Wakanda]]ns staged an ambush. [[File:Namor and Ironheart.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor is attacked by [[Ironheart]]]] Namor flew into the air as the [[Talokanil]] got to the ship. He approached a [[Dragon Flyer]], slicing its side, then throwing it onto the boat. He then noticed [[Riri Williams]] in the air, now in her [[Ironheart Armor: Mark II|Ironheart armor]], dodged her blasts before getting hit and trapped inside a [[Royal Talon Fighter]]. There, he encountered Shuri, now the [[Black Panther]]. Namor did not think much of it until he started feeling sick. He looked up to see heat rays coming at him. Black Panther announced that she was there for retribution. [[File:NamorFightsBlackPanther.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor fights [[Black Panther]]]] Namor quickly rammed his [[Talokanil Spear|spear]] into the ship. The raw [[Vibranium]] sliced through the ship. Black Panther attacked and they had a prolonged fight, dodging each other's blows. Namor then made a desperation push, to get Black Panther away before slamming the ship, causing it to explode, expelling them onto a desert beach. [[File:NamorMissesPunch.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor misses a punch]] On the surface, the two fought more, but Black Panther could not find Namor at first. The king charged from the sky, taking her out many times without her even seeing him. He then grabbed Black Panther and flew her into the air with him. They exchanged punches into the air until Namor flew Black Panther into the ground, tackling her. He repeatedly punched Black Panther until she sliced off his ankle wing, causing Namor immense pain as he screamed, ripped it off his leg and flipped him over to the ground. [[File:NamorBurningOnGround.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor is defeated]] He flew at Black Panther using his three wings and punched her against the wall, but after a few punches, Black Panther blocked his next punch and clawed at his back before emitting energy. Shuri proceeded to gain the upper hand by knocking him to the ground a few times with kicks, before approaching him with her claws. However, Namor crawled to his spear and impaled Shuri with it. He noted that his deal with Shuri back in Talokan could have been different if not for the chaos. Although he wanted to finish her off, he was more worried about getting to the water. He dodged an incoming attack before facing Shuri, putting up his fists to fight. Instead, she yelled "Wakanda forever" and caused an explosion, making Namor fall over in flames. [[File:NamorAndShuriEndFight.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor and [[Black Panther]] announce a truce]] Shuri used her feet to flip Namor over, so his back was on the ground, and then took Namor's spear and pointed it at his neck. However, she paused for a moment and surprised Namor, giving him a chance to yield. She said if he did not yield, she would destroy Talokan. Namor graciously did yield and formed a new alliance. Shuri and Namor flew back to the battle where Namor yelled for his army to stop fighting. They did so and knelt to him.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====Painting His Room==== [[File:BP Wakanda Forever Trailer (5).png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor paints and contemplates his plan]] {{Quote|Dus [[Black Panther|Boox Báalam'o]] yan taak'in pinu mai'het en wini'ki de tu la'tal le'da ha'eiton e'nooknumo jaan'no komilo. Baale’ menan o'hmo anulte. Behlae’ tunni uch-ik och'ki u ti’ le enale'al [[Talokan]]. Yetel lok doc'tiknetah, Talokan bin il-aak'heh hachamu'gachon'ta meyhish donchi.Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''The [[Black Panther]] is the most powerful person in the [[Wakanda|most powerful nation]] on the [[Earth|surface]]. But she has no allies. Now she has empathy for the people of [[Talokan]]. With this alliance, Talokan will be stronger than ever.''"|Namor to [[Namora]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} With the war concluded, Namor returned to his nation alongside the rest of the [[Talokanil]] [[Talokanil Armed Forces|warriors]] who assisted him in battle. While painting a new mural on his wall reflecting his conflict with [[Wakanda]], a disappointed [[Namora]] entered his [[Namor's Cenote|cenote]]. She expressed disillusionment at the conflict's outcome and her king's decision to form a peaceful pact with a nation on the surface world. [[File:NamorAssuresNamora.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namor reassures [[Namora]] about his plan]] Namor exclaimed that [[Black Panther]] had every reason to kill him for his actions against her family and people, and that his defeat was inevitable due to Black Panther being the strongest individual within [[Earth]]'s most technologically powerful nation. He then confidently reassured Namora that should the time come when Wakanda came into conflict with intervening world powers, they would turn to [[Talokan]] for help in defeating them.{{Ref|BPWF}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|The [[Talokanil Herb|plant]] gave me wings on my ankles, and ears that point into the clouds. I was a [[mutant]]. I could swim in the sky and age slower. Breathe the air our ancestors breathed.|Namor|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} *'''Talokanil Mutant Physiology''': Namor is unique among the [[Talokanil]] in which his physiology is vastly different compared with his people. Unlike his people who are only able to breathe in water, Namor is able to breathe both on land and in water through a form of diffusion which allows him to "breathe" through his skin. His strength is directly proportional to the amount of water he exposed. In other words, the more Namor is exposed to water, the stronger he gets. However, there are some drawbacks with this power, as for Namor to maintain that high level of strength, he has to occasionally return to a wet environment in order to regain his strength, and he is also susceptible to environment with high evaporation rates like deserts or hot climates due to the fact it removes the water from his body at an increased rate. **'''Superhuman Strength''': [[File:Kinetic Energy BPWF.png|thumb|250px|Namor striking Shuri]] Namor possesses immense superhuman strength, numerous times stronger than any other Talokanil. According to [[M'Baku]], Namor's physical strength might rival that of [[Hulk]]. This exceptional strength was demonstrated when he used his raw power to fling and rotate a helicopter mid-air into the ocean. Namor used his strength to throw a [[Dragon Flyer]] at other ship with ease, slice [[Ayo]]'s [[Royal Talon Fighter]] in half with his [[Talokanil Spear|spear]], pierce through a hole in the glass window of the throne room in Wakanda, and also hurl multiple [[Hydrobomb]]s toward the throne room to flood it. He was also able to slice two Dragon Flyers with his spear, throwing one of them at the ''[[Sea Leopard]]''. During his fight against [[Black Panther]], despite being significantly weakened from dehydration, he was still able to overpower her and even pierce his spear right through her stomach despite her wearing the [[Panther Habit]]. **'''Superhuman Durability''': Namor's skin, muscle, and bone tissue have many times the density of the same tissue in the body of a human being, making him nigh-invulnerable, much more than a regular Talokanil, which is more effective when he is in contact with water. During his attack on [[Wakanda]], when M'Baku tried to use his staff to attack Namor from behind, Namor simply raised his hand and broke the staff as it hit him. When [[Ironheart]] attacked him right in the chest with a full powered blast, Namor did not seem to receive any form of physical damage. Even when dehydrated and without water nearby, he was able to withstand multiple attacks from Black Panther, a kinetic energy pulse at point-black range that pulverized a massive stone boulder and being burnt in the back, before finally falling down to the ground. **'''Superhuman Speed''': Both in water and land, Namor can move at incredible superhuman speeds. He was able to get from [[Talokan]] in the Atlantic Ocean to [[Wakanda]] in [[Africa]] in a matter of hours. While attacking Wakanda, Namor was able to run and swim fast enough to dodge fire from [[Shuri]] and [[Aneka]]'s [[Sunbird|ship]], impressing them both with his speed. During his battle with [[Black Panther]], Namor was able to land blows that even Shuri did not see coming, being able to control the Wakandan Princess for most of the battle, as well as block several of her attacks with ease. **'''Superhuman Agility''': In both water and land, Namor possesses naturally more agility, equilibrium, balance and body coordination than a normal human and most of his species. He is able to perform superhuman and acrobatic feats in air and in water. **'''Superhuman Stamina''': While in contact with water, Namor's advanced musculature is considerably more efficient than that of a human and most of the other [[Talokanil]]. As a result, his muscles virtually do not produce fatigue toxins during physical activity compared to humans and other members of his race. His virtually inexhaustible endurance allows him to exercise his maximum capacity for an indefinite period of time without tiring at all. He was able to leap between structures, dive into the water and resurface multiple times during his attack on [[Wakanda]] and still do not show signs of fatigue or tiredness. However, Namor can still get easily tired if his body dries up completely and does not come contact with water, although he was still able to fight [[Shuri]] for a long period of time. **'''Superhuman Reflexes''': Namor's reflexes allow him to react and dodge objects and attacks at high speed. While attacking Wakanda, Namor was able to block the Wakandan ships' fire with his spear. During the battle at the ''[[Sea Leopard]]'', Namor was able to dodge most of [[Ironheart]]'s energy blasts with ease. Namor was also able to block [[M'Baku]]'s attack, even while being attacked from behind. **'''Enhanced Vision''': Namor possesses enhanced vision that is far better than humans, allowing him to see clearly even in the depths of the ocean. **'''Enhanced Hearing''': Namor possesses much greater hearing than a human and any other Talokanil, being able to hear [[Ramonda]] and [[Shuri]]'s conversation even while underwater. **'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': Despite his body's resistance, Namor could still be injured like any other [[Talokanil]]. However, his metabolism enabled him to rapidly regenerate damaged bodily tissue with great speed, which is more effective when he is in contact with water. After having his back completely burned by a [[Wakanda|Wakandan]] ship's explosion, Namor was able to regenerate shortly after. **'''Longevity''': Unique in his people, due to his mutant physiology, Namor is able to live much longer than any other [[Talokanil]]. Despite being born in the [[Before 20th Century|1500s]], Namor still looks like a man in his thirties. **'''Flight''': Thanks to a pair of feather wings on both ankles, Namor is able to fly. His ability to fly combined with his superhuman agility allowed Namor to easily dodge any aerial attacks against him and perform acrobatic attacks with ease. **'''Aquatic Adaptation''': Aside from being able to breathe normally at the surface, Namor is capable of breathing underwater by absorbing the oxygen of the water through his skin, and his body is specially developed for underwater conditions, granting him specialized blood circulation to withstand freezing temperatures. He possesses a highly developed vision to see clearly even in the near-total darkness of the ocean floor, and he can also hear underwater as well as humans do on land. **'''Aquatic Telepathy''': Like any other [[Talokanil]], Namor can mentally communicate with marine life and persuade them to do his bidding. **'''Hypnosis''': Namor, as well as other [[Talokanil]] can create a sound that hypnotize his victims, leading them to jump into the water, where they will drown. However, this can be stopped by a loud sound. **'''Wallcrawling''': Namor is able to crawl on any type of walls. ===Abilities=== {{Expand}} {{Quote|Ajawil Ajawta'e!Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''Imperius Rex!''"|Namor|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} *'''Master Combatant''': [[File:Elbow Shot from Namor.png|right|thumb|250px|Namor overpowers [[Black Panther]]]] Namor is a dangerous and formidable foe in hand-to-hand combat. He is able to defeat great warriors such as [[M'Baku]] and even dominated the new [[Black Panther]], only retreating due to Shuri's usage of technology and dry land. *'''Spear Mastery''': Namor is skilled with his spear, easily destroying several Wakandan ships with it. *'''Master Acrobat''': Namor is a flexible foe to face off against, even for an enhanced [[Shuri]]. {{Quote|My ancestors would often say "Only the most broken people can be great leaders".|Namor|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} *'''Master Tactician''': By means of harassment and tactics, Namor is able to keep the existence of [[Talokan]] a secret to all other people. He is also a formidable tactician in that he devises attack strategies in attacking surface mining vessels and orchestrated the [[Attack on Birnin Zana|attack]] on [[Wakanda]], which devastated the country. He is also quick in realizing that an alliance with Wakanda could bring interest and tactical value to Talokan. *'''Multilingualism''': Namor is fluent in his native Yucatec Maya, as well as English, Spanish, and some Latin. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== {{Expand}} *'''[[Talokanil Spear|Spear]]''': Namor had a spear made of raw vibranium which he often used in combat. *'''[[Hydrobomb]]''': Namor used these explosives when attacking the [[Citadel]], flooding the throne room inside which drowned [[Ramonda]]. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Namor's Headdress|Headdress]]''': Namor's ceremonial helmet is worn when he speaks as King of [[Talokan]] to his people. For example, he wears it when he tells the [[Talokanil]] that he is going to [[Talokanil-Wakandan War|war]] with [[Wakanda]]. Much like his original namesake, K'uk'ulkan, Namor's helmet represents a feathered serpent. ==Facilities== {{Expand}} *'''[[Talokan Capital City]]''': ''To be added'' *'''[[Namor's Cenote|Cenote]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *Father † *[[Fen]] † - Mother ===Allies=== *[[Talokanil Armed Forces]] - Subordinates **[[Attuma]] - Advisor **[[Namora]] - Advisor *[[Golden Tribe]] **[[Black Panther|Shuri/Black Panther]] - Former Attempted Victim and Former Attempted Killer *[[Nakia]] - Former Enemy *[[Midnight Angels]] - Former Enemies **[[Okoye]] **[[Aneka]] *[[Dora Milaje]] - Former Enemies **[[Ayo]] **[[Nomble]] **[[Yama]] *[[Jabari Tribe]] - Former Enemies **[[M'Baku]] *[[Wakandan Royal Guard]] - Former Enemies *[[Ironheart|Riri Williams/Ironheart]] - Former Attempted Victim {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Conquistadores]] *[[CIA]] **[[Graham (Doctor)|Graham]] † - Victim *[[United States Navy SEALs]] *[[Ramonda]] † - Victim {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, '''Namor McKenzie''', also called the '''Sub-Mariner''', is the son of human sea captain [[w:c:marvel:Leonard McKenzie|Leonard McKenzie]] and the [[Atlantis|Atlantean]] princess [[Fen]], who possesses winged feet as a result of his [[mutant]] genetics. He has been a frequent rival and occasional ally to [[T'Challa|Black Panther]] and the [[Fantastic Four]], serving as a romantic rival to [[Mister Fantastic]] for [[Invisible Woman]]'s affections (which she returns but is ultimately faithful and loyal to Richards), in addition to serving as a member of the [[Illuminati]] in addition to its evil counterpart, the Cabal alongside [[Loki]], [[Green Goblin]], [[Doctor Doom]] and fellow mutant {{WPS|Emma Frost}}. He is also one of the founding and original members of the [[Defenders]] alongside [[Doctor Strange]] and [[Hulk]]. He also served as a member of the [[Invaders]] during [[World War II]] alongside [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]], [[Bucky Barnes]], and the android [[Synthetic Man|Human Torch]]. While possessed by the {{WPS|Phoenix Force (comics)|Phoenix Force}}, Namor gave in to his hatred of Black Panther and completely flooded [[Wakanda]]. *In the comics, '''Kukulkán''' is a Mayan god of wind and sky who once possessed [[w:c:marvel:Juan Meroz (Earth-616)|El Tigre]]. **{{WPS|Kukulkan|K'uk'ulkan}} (''"Plumed Serpent", "amazing Serpent"'') is the name of a Mesoamerican serpent deity that was worshipped by the Yucatec Maya people of the Yucatán Peninsula before the Spanish conquest of [[Yucatán]]. *Namor the Sub-Mariner was originally created for an appearance in ''Marvel Comics'' #1 published in August 1939, when [[Marvel Comics (publisher)|Marvel Comics]] still operated as Timely Comics. This makes him one of Marvel's first ever characters to appear in publications. ==Behind the Scenes== *The film ''[[Iron Man 2]]'' first hinted at a possible appearance of Namor in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]]. During the conversation between [[Tony Stark]] and [[Nick Fury]] at the end of the film, one of the holographic maps in the background had a "hot-spot" marked in the middle of the Atlantic Ocean, the general location of [[Atlantis]].[https://screenrant.com/mcu-namor-atlantis-references/ All Of The MCU References To Namor & Atlantis] *In an interview with ''{{WPS|Empire (magazine)|Empire}}'', [[Kevin Feige]] revealed that [[Ryan Coogler]] had pitched to him a tag for the end of ''[[Black Panther (film)|Black Panther]]'' that teased Namor's introduction, depicting his wet footprints leading straight to the Wakandan throne in the [[Citadel]].[https://www.empireonline.com/movies/news/namor-is-a-dream-antagonist-for-black-panther-wakanda-forever-says-ryan-coogler-exclusive-image/ Namor Is ‘A Dream Antagonist’ For Black Panther: Wakanda Forever, Says Ryan Coogler – Exclusive Image] *According to [[Ryan Coogler]], the {{WPS|DC Extended Universe}} film ''{{WPS|Aquaman (film)|Aquaman}}'' served as inspiration for adapting Namor to the big screen.[https://gamerant.com/black-panther-wakanda-forever-ryan-coogler-how-aquaman-affected-namor/ Black Panther: Wakanda Forever's Ryan Coogler Shares How Aquaman Affected Namor] *[[Michael Waldron]] had stated that there were discussions about possibly including an alternate Namor from Earth-838 in ''[[Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness]]'' as a part of the [[Illuminati]] due to Namor being an original member of the Illuminati in the comics. However, [[Marvel Studios]] had [[Black Panther: Wakanda Forever|other plans]] for Namor so his inclusion from the film was dropped.[https://variety.com/2022/film/news/doctor-strange-2-spoilers-scarlet-witch-cameos-1235263318/ ‘Doctor Strange 2’ Screenwriter Defends Wanda’s Evolution, Talks Cameos and His ‘Star Wars’ Script] *To prepare for his role as Namor, [[Tenoch Huerta]] learned a {{WPS|Mayan languages|Mayan language}} and how to swim.[https://www.vice.com/en/article/7kb5pe/black-panther-tenoch-huerta-calls-out-mexico-racism New ‘Black Panther’ Star Is Calling Out Mexico for Its Racism][https://gizmodo.com/black-panther-wakanda-forever-marvel-tenoch-huerta-namo-1849484575 ''Black Panther 2'''s Tenoch Huerta Didn't Know How to Swim When He Became Namor] *[[Miguel-Andres Garcia]] was a stunt double for [[Tenoch Huerta]] in the role of Namor. ==References== {{Gallery|Namor/Gallery}} {{Wq|Namor}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Namor}} *{{Marvel|Kukulcan}} *{{WP|Namor}} *{{WP|Kukulkan}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/namor}} [[es:Namor]] [[pl:Namor]] [[pt-br:Namor]] [[ru:Нэмор Подводник]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Black Panther: Wakanda Forever Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Doomsday Characters]] [[Category:Talokanil]] [[Category:Mutants]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Royalty]] [[Category:High Body Count]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]]
